ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin (e.g., RA0/AN0/ULPWU/C12IN0-) */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the pin (e.g., RA0, AN0, ULPWU, C12IN0-) */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input supported by the pin (e.g., TTL, AN) */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output supported by the pin (e.g., CMOS, —) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pin's purpose */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the pin configuration */,
  "default_function" TEXT /* Default function of the pin */,
  "is_multiplexed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pin is multiplexed */,
  "multiplex_functions" TEXT /* List of multiplex functions if the pin is multiplexed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller model */,
  "mcu_model" TEXT /* Model name of the microcontroller */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the microcontroller */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the microcontroller */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Technical specifications of the microcontroller */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the microcontroller model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the microcontroller model is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the microcontroller model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mcu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin configuration */,
  "mcu_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller model */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the configuration is associated with */,
  "configuration_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created or last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the configuration */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default configuration for the pin */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the configuration */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_mcu_id FOREIGN KEY ("mcu_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("mcu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Project manager */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget for the project */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pin group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the group was created */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the pin group */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default pin group */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the pin group */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_pins" (
  "group_pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group-pin relationship */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin group */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the group-pin relationship */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default group-pin relationship */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the group-pin relationship */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_pins_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES pin_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_pins_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_versions" (
  "config_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin configuration */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created this version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES pin_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_pins" (
  "project_pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-pin relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the pin was assigned to the project */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* User who assigned the pin to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_pins_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_pins_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object specifying the permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
